content.json:
UniFi Syslog
CCF PUSHPREVIEW
Operational and threat-detection console for UniFi UDM, switch and access-point syslog telemetry. CEF and synthetic-CEF events land in CommonSecurityLog; forensic catch-all in Unifi_Syslog_CL. Ingest-time enrichment with MaxMind GeoIP/ASN + FireHOL / Spamhaus / Tor threat-intel feeds. Pick a subscription + workspace, then explore via the tabs below. The Investigation tab takes a Source IP and shows everything we know about it.

content.query:
union
  (CommonSecurityLog | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}                          | summarize V=toreal(count())               | extend Metric="Total events",     Order=1),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(MaliciousIP) | summarize V=toreal(count())          | extend Metric="TI matches",       Order=2),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where toint(LogSeverity) >= 8 | summarize V=toreal(count())          | extend Metric="Critical events",  Order=3),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceEventClassID == "sshd_auth_fail"               | summarize V=toreal(count())               | extend Metric="SSH failures",     Order=4),
  (SecurityIncident | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where Title startswith "UniFi"                              | summarize V=toreal(count())               | extend Metric="Open incidents",   Order=5)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

content.json: Geographic origin of inbound traffic

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotnull(MaliciousIPLatitude
    ) and isnotnull(MaliciousIPLongitude)
| summarize Hits = count(),
            DistinctIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
            Severity = max(toint(ThreatSeverity)),
            Feeds = make_set(ThreatDescription, 3)
  by Country = coalesce(MaliciousIPCountry, "(unknown)"),
     Latitude = toreal(MaliciousIPLatitude),
     Longitude = toreal(MaliciousIPLongitude)
| order by Hits desc
| take 500
content.title: Attackers world map (size = hit count, color = TI severity)
content.noDataMessage: No geo-located events. Either no external traffic, or MaxMind enrichment isn't populating MaliciousIPLatitude/Longitude.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIPCountry)
| summarize Events = count() by Country = MaliciousIPCountry
| order by Events desc | take 25
content.title: Top source countries by event volume

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIP
    )
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIPCountry)
| summarize TIHits = count() by Country = MaliciousIPCountry
| order by TIHits desc | take 25
content.title: Top countries on TI feeds (high-confidence threats)
content.noDataMessage: No TI matches with country attribution yet.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIP
    )
| extend Hour = hourofday(TimeGenerated), DOW = case(dayofweek(TimeGenerated)==0d, "Sun", dayofweek(TimeGenerated)==1d, "Mon", dayofweek(TimeGenerated)==2d, "Tue", dayofweek(TimeGenerated)==3d, "Wed", dayofweek(TimeGenerated)==4d, "Thu", dayofweek(TimeGenerated)==5d, "Fri", "Sat")
| summarize Hits = count() by DOW, Hour
| order by Hour asc
content.title: When are attacks coming in? (hour-of-day x day-of-week)
content.noDataMessage: No TI matches yet - heatmap needs TI-flagged events to populate.

content.query:
union
  (SecurityIncident | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where Title startswith "UniFi" | summarize Value=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Total UniFi incidents", Order=1),
  (SecurityIncident | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where Title startswith "UniFi" | where Status == "New"        | summarize Value=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="New",                  Order=2),
  (SecurityIncident | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where Title startswith "UniFi" | where Status == "Active"     | summarize Value=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Active",               Order=3),
  (SecurityIncident | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where Title startswith "UniFi" | where Severity == "High"     | summarize Value=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="High severity",        Order=4),
  (SecurityAlert    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where AlertName has "UniFi"                                   | summarize Value=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Alerts fired",         Order=5)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value

SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Title startswith "UniFi"
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Severity
content.title: Incidents created over time, by severity
content.noDataMessage: No UniFi-prefixed incidents in this window. Incidents are auto-created when one of the 8 packaged analytic rules fires.

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Title startswith "UniFi"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| extend OwnerName = tostring(Owner.assignedTo)
| project CreatedTime, LastModifiedTime, IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, Status,
          Owner = iff(isnotempty(OwnerName), OwnerName, "(unassigned)"),
          Description, IncidentUrl
| order by CreatedTime desc
| take 100
content.title: Latest UniFi incidents (status, severity, owner, link to Sentinel)
content.noDataMessage: No UniFi incidents in this time range. The 8 packaged rules cover: TI match, IDS/IPS, SSH brute force, repeated firewall drops, admin-from-WAN, VPN brute force, Tor exit, critical severity.

content.title: Which rules are firing most? (by analytic rule)
content.noDataMessage: No alerts fired. Confirm the analytic rules are enabled in Sentinel -> Analytics. Rules ship as templates and must be activated.

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Title startswith "UniFi"
| summarize Count = count() by Severity
| order by Severity asc
content.title: Severity mix
content.noDataMessage: No incidents to summarise.

parameters.name: TargetIP
parameters.label: Source IP
parameters.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) and not(ipv4_is_private(SourceIP))
| summarize Hits=count(), TIMatch=take_any(ThreatDescription), Country=take_any(MaliciousIPCountry) by SourceIP
| order by Hits desc
| project value=SourceIP, label=strcat(SourceIP, "   (", Hits, " hits", iff(isnotempty(TIMatch), strcat(", TI: ", TIMatch), ""), iff(isnotempty(Country), strcat(", ", Country), ""), ")"), selected=false
| take 200

content.title: Activity over time for this source
content.noDataMessage: Pick a Source IP from the dropdown above. The list is populated with TI-flagged and high-volume sources from this time range.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where SourceIP == "{TargetIP}"
| where isnotempty(DestinationPort
    )
| summarize Hits = count() by DestinationPort = tostring(DestinationPort)
| order by Hits desc | take 15
content.title: Ports targeted
content.noDataMessage: No port activity for the selected source.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where SourceIP == "{TargetIP}"
| extend ASN_OrgClean = iff(DeviceCustomString4 matches regex @"^[0-9a-fA-F:]{17}$", "", DeviceCustomString4)
| summarize Country = take_any(MaliciousIPCountry),
            ASN_Org = take_any(ASN_OrgClean),
            ASN_Number = take_any(DeviceCustomNumber1),
            Latitude = take_any(MaliciousIPLatitude),
            Longitude = take_any(MaliciousIPLongitude),
            TIFeeds = make_set(ThreatDescription, 5),
            ThreatTypes = make_set(IndicatorThreatType, 3),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            TotalEvents = count(),
            DistinctTargetPorts = dcount(DestinationPort),
            DistinctDestinationIPs = dcount(DestinationIP)
| extend ASN_Org = iff(isempty(ASN_Org), "(none - internal IP or missing enrichment)", ASN_Org),
         Country = iff(isempty(Country), "(none)", Country)
| project Country, ASN_Org, ASN_Number, Latitude, Longitude, TIFeeds, ThreatTypes, FirstSeen, LastSeen, TotalEvents, DistinctTargetPorts, DistinctDestinationIPs
content.title: Enrichment & identity card
content.noDataMessage: Pick a Source IP from the dropdown above.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where SourceIP == "{TargetIP}"
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceAction, DeviceProduct, DeviceEventClassID, Activity,
          DestinationIP, DestinationPort, Protocol,
          Detail = coalesce(Message, Activity, DeviceEventClassID, "(no detail)")
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Last 100 events from this source
content.noDataMessage: No events for this source IP in the time range. Try widening the time range or picking a different IP.

content.query:
union
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where isnotempty(MaliciousIP) | summarize Value=toreal(count())              | extend Metric="TI hits",          Order=1),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where isnotempty(MaliciousIP) | summarize Value=toreal(dcount(SourceIP))    | extend Metric="Distinct bad IPs", Order=2),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where ThreatDescription contains "," | summarize Value=toreal(dcount(SourceIP)) | extend Metric="Multi-feed IPs",  Order=3),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where toint(ThreatSeverity) >= 7 | summarize Value=toreal(count())        | extend Metric="High-severity TI", Order=4),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where IndicatorThreatType has "Anonymization" or ThreatDescription has "tor_exit" | summarize Value=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Tor exit hits",     Order=5)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value

CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIP)
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| mv-expand Feed = split(ThreatDescription, ", ")
| summarize Hits = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Feed = tostring(Feed)
content.title: TI matches over time, split by feed

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIP)
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Hits = count() by IndicatorThreatType
| order by Hits desc
content.title: Threat type breakdown

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIP) and ThreatDescription contains ","
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Hits = count(),
            Feeds = make_set(ThreatDescription, 5),
            TargetPorts = make_set(DestinationPort, 10),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            Country = take_any(MaliciousIPCountry),
            ASN_Org = take_any(DeviceCustomString4),
            Severity = toint(take_any(ThreatSeverity))
  by SourceIP, IndicatorThreatType
| order by Severity desc, Hits desc
| take 50
content.title: IPs matched by 2+ TI feeds (highest investigation priority)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIP)
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Hits = count(),
            Feeds = make_set(ThreatDescription, 5),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            Country = take_any(MaliciousIPCountry),
            ASN_Org = take_any(DeviceCustomString4),
            Severity = toint(take_any(ThreatSeverity))
  by SourceIP, IndicatorThreatType
| order by Hits desc
| take 100
content.title: All TI-flagged sources

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIP)
| mv-expand Feed = split(ThreatDescription, ", ")
| summarize Hits = count(),
            UniqueSources = dcount(SourceIP)
  by Feed = tostring(Feed)
| order by Hits desc
content.title: Hits per TI feed (7-day rolling - which feeds pull their weight?)
content.noDataMessage: No TI feed matches in the last 7 days. The MaxMind feed updater runs on 6-hour cadence in the container.

content.query:
union
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall"                                          | summarize Value=toreal(count())            | extend Metric="Total events",     Order=1),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall" | where DeviceAction =~ "ALLOW"          | summarize Value=toreal(count())            | extend Metric="Allowed",          Order=2),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall" | where DeviceAction in~ ("DROP","REJECT") | summarize Value=toreal(count())          | extend Metric="Dropped/rejected", Order=3),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall" | where DeviceEventClassID == "WAN_LOCAL" | summarize Value=toreal(count())            | extend Metric="WAN_LOCAL",        Order=4),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall" | where DeviceEventClassID == "LAN_LAN"   | summarize Value=toreal(count())            | extend Metric="LAN_LAN",          Order=5),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall" | where isnotempty(SourceIP) and not(ipv4_is_private(SourceIP)) | summarize Value=toreal(dcount(SourceIP)) | extend Metric="Distinct ext src", Order=6)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value

CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), DeviceAction
content.title: Firewall actions over time

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Events = count() by DeviceEventClassID
| order by Events desc
content.title: Zone direction (LAN_LAN vs WAN_LOCAL)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall"
| where DeviceAction in~ ("DROP", "REJECT")
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(DestinationPort)
| summarize Hits = count() by DestinationPort = tostring(DestinationPort)
| order by Hits desc | take 15
content.title: Most-targeted destination ports (DROP/REJECT)

content.json: Filtered to non-RFC1918 sources only so Country / ASN / TI enrichment columns populate. Internal LAN drops are not enriched at ingest.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall"
| where DeviceAction in~ ("DROP", "REJECT")
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) and not(ipv4_is_private(SourceIP))
| summarize Drops = count(),
            DistinctDstPorts = dcount(DestinationPort),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            Country = take_any(coalesce(MaliciousIPCountry, DeviceCustomString3)),
            ASN_Org = take_any(DeviceCustomString4),
            TIMatch = take_any(ThreatDescription)
  by SourceIP
| order by Drops desc
| take 25
content.title: External sources with most DROP/REJECT events
content.noDataMessage: No external (non-RFC1918) DROP/REJECT events. All blocked traffic in this window is internal LAN.

content.json: Internal LAN drops (RFC1918 sources) — typically misconfigured hosts hitting a firewall rule:

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall"
| where DeviceAction in~ ("DROP", "REJECT")
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) and ipv4_is_private(SourceIP)
| summarize Drops = count(),
            DistinctDstPorts = dcount(DestinationPort),
            DistinctDstIPs = dcount(DestinationIP),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            Hostname = take_any(SourceHostName),
            MAC = take_any(SourceMACAddress)
  by SourceIP
| order by Drops desc
| take 15
content.title: Internal LAN sources with most DROP/REJECT events
content.noDataMessage: No internal LAN clients have triggered firewall DROP/REJECT rules. Healthy state.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" and DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) and not(ipv4_is_private(SourceIP))
| summarize DistinctPorts = dcount(DestinationPort),
            Attempts = count(),
            Ports = make_set(DestinationPort, 25),
            Country = take_any(coalesce(MaliciousIPCountry, DeviceCustomString3)),
            ASN_Org = take_any(DeviceCustomString4),
            TIMatch = take_any(ThreatDescription)
  by SourceIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where DistinctPorts >= 10
| order by DistinctPorts desc
content.title: Port-scan candidates (>=10 distinct destination ports per source per 5-min window)
content.noDataMessage: No port-scan-shaped source in this window.

content.json: These mirror the 10 hunting queries packaged with the Solution. Each runs live below; tune the time range above to widen or narrow the window.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIP) and toint(ThreatSeverity) >= 5
| summarize Attempts = count(), Countries = make_set(MaliciousIPCountry, 5), Feeds = make_set(ThreatDescription, 5) by SourceIP, IndicatorThreatType
| order by Attempts desc | take 50

content.json: 2 / 10 Port scanner sweep detection

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceEventCategory =~ "Firewall"
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) and not(ipv4_is_private(SourceIP))
| summarize DistinctPorts = dcount(DestinationPort), Attempts = count(), Country = take_any(MaliciousIPCountry)
  by SourceIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where DistinctPorts >= 10
| order by DistinctPorts desc

content.json: 3 / 10 TI-flagged probes against application ports

content.query:
let app_ports = dynamic([22,23,80,443,445,1433,3306,3389,5432,5900,8080,8443,32400,4005]);
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIP)
| where toint(DestinationPort) in (app_ports)
| summarize Attempts = count(), Sources = dcount(SourceIP), Country = make_set(MaliciousIPCountry, 5)
  by DestinationPort
| order by Attempts desc

content.json: 4 / 10 First-seen external sources (vs 30-day baseline)

content.query:
let historic = CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1h))
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) | distinct SourceIP;
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) and not(ipv4_is_private(SourceIP))
| where SourceIP !in (historic)
| summarize Hits = count(), Country = take_any(MaliciousIPCountry), ASN_Org = take_any(DeviceCustomString4), TIMatch = take_any(ThreatDescription)
  by SourceIP
| order by Hits desc

content.json: 5 / 10 Geo-anomalous admin / SSH activity

content.query:
let expected = dynamic(["GB","US",""]);
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceEventClassID == "sshd_auth_success" or (DeviceEventCategory has_any ("admin","auth") and DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti")
| extend Country = coalesce(MaliciousIPCountry, DeviceCustomString3)
| where Country !in (expected)
| project TimeGenerated, SourceIP, SourceUserName, Country, ASN_Org=DeviceCustomString4, Activity, DeviceAction
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let system_users = dynamic(["unifi-protect","unifi","unifi-network","ubios-udapi","ubios"]);
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceEventClassID == "sudo_command"
| where SourceUserName !in (system_users)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SourceUserName, DestinationUserName, Command=Message
| order by TimeGenerated desc

content.json: 7 / 10 SSH brute force - most-targeted accounts

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceEventClassID == "sshd_auth_fail"
| summarize Attempts = count(), DistinctSources = dcount(SourceIP), TopCountries = make_set(MaliciousIPCountry, 10)
  by TargetUser = SourceUserName
| order by Attempts desc

content.json: 8 / 10 WiFi deauth flooding (possible Karma / Evil Twin)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceEventClassID in ("wifi_deauth", "wifi_disassoc")
| summarize Events = count(), DistinctClients = dcount(SourceMACAddress)
  by Computer, DeviceEventClassID, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where Events >= 20
| order by Events desc

content.json: 9 / 10 DHCP NAK / DECLINE anomalies

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceEventClassID in ("dhcp_NAK", "dhcp_DECLINE")
| summarize Events = count(), Clients = make_set(SourceMACAddress, 25), Interfaces = make_set(DeviceInboundInterface, 5)
  by DeviceAction
| order by Events desc

content.json: 10 / 10 TI feed effectiveness comparison (7-day)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(MaliciousIP)
| mv-expand Feed = split(ThreatDescription, ", ")
| summarize Hits = count(), UniqueSources = dcount(SourceIP) by Feed = tostring(Feed)
| order by Hits desc

union
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceEventClassID == "sshd_auth_success"                         | summarize Value=toreal(count())            | extend Metric="SSH success",          Order=1),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceEventClassID == "sshd_auth_fail"                            | summarize Value=toreal(count())            | extend Metric="SSH failures",         Order=2),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceEventClassID == "sshd_auth_fail" | where isnotempty(SourceIP) | summarize Value=toreal(dcount(SourceIP))   | extend Metric="Distinct SSH src",    Order=3),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceEventClassID == "sudo_command"                              | summarize Value=toreal(count())            | extend Metric="Sudo events",          Order=4),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where DeviceEventClassID == "sshd_auth_success" or DeviceEventCategory has_any ("admin","auth") | where isnotempty(SourceIP) and not(ipv4_is_private(SourceIP)) | summarize Value=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Admin from WAN", Order=5)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value

content.title: SSH success vs failure over time
content.noDataMessage: No SSH events. UniFi consoles emit sshd events when Console Settings -> Remote Logging is enabled.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceEventClassID == "sshd_auth_fail"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Attempts = count(),
            TargetUsers = make_set(SourceUserName, 25),
            Country = take_any(coalesce(MaliciousIPCountry, DeviceCustomString3)),
            ASN_Org = take_any(DeviceCustomString4),
            TIMatch = take_any(ThreatDescription),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
  by SourceIP
| order by Attempts desc
content.title: SSH failures grouped by source IP
content.noDataMessage: No SSH failures in this window.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceEventClassID == "sudo_command"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SourceUserName, DestinationUserName, Command = Message, PWD = DeviceCustomString1, Product = DeviceProduct
| order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100
content.title: Sudo activity (service-account noise demoted at ingest)
content.noDataMessage: No real-user sudo events. Service-account sudo (unifi-protect, ubios-udapi) is demoted to Unifi_Syslog_CL at ingest.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where DeviceEventClassID == "sshd_auth_success" or DeviceEventCategory has_any ("admin","auth","login","logon")
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) and not(ipv4_is_private(SourceIP))
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SourceIP, SourceUserName, DeviceAction, Activity, Country = MaliciousIPCountry, ASN_Org = DeviceCustomString4, TIMatch = ThreatDescription
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Admin / auth events from external IPs (RFC1918 excluded)
content.noDataMessage: No admin/auth events from non-RFC1918 sources - healthy state. Anything here is admin access from outside the LAN and warrants review.

content.query:
union
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"                  | summarize Value=toreal(count())                     | extend Metric="CEF rows (24h)",       Order=1),
  (Unifi_Syslog_CL   | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}                                                    | summarize Value=toreal(count())                     | extend Metric="Catchall rows",       Order=2),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where isnotempty(MaliciousIPCountry) | summarize Value=toreal(100.0 * count() / 1.0) | extend Metric="Geo-enriched",        Order=3),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where isnotempty(MaliciousIP) | summarize Value=toreal(count())                       | extend Metric="TI-enriched",         Order=4),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"                  | summarize Value=toreal(dcount(Computer))            | extend Metric="Sources reporting",   Order=5)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value

union
  (CommonSecurityLog | where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti" | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize CEF = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)),
  (Unifi_Syslog_CL                                       | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Catchall = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m))
content.title: Rows landing per 5-min bucket

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend HasCountry = isnotempty(MaliciousIPCountry)
| summarize Count = count() by HasCountry
| project Status = iff(HasCountry, "Enriched (GeoIP populated)", "No country / private IP"), Count
content.title: MaxMind GeoIP enrichment coverage (% of CEF rows with country)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend MatchedTI = isnotempty(MaliciousIP)
| summarize Count = count() by MatchedTI
| project Status = iff(MatchedTI, "Matched a TI feed", "Clean (no feed match)"), Count
content.title: TI feed coverage (% of CEF rows matched at ingest)

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where DataType in ("CommonSecurityLog", "Unifi_Syslog_CL")
| summarize Quantity = sum(Quantity) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), DataType
content.title: Daily ingestion volume per table (MB)

content.query:
_LogOperation
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName=Operation, Level, Category, Detail
| order by TimeGenerated desc | take 50
content.title: _LogOperation entries (drops / throttles / schema mismatches)
content.noDataMessage: No Log Analytics operational issues. _LogOperation captures throttles, schema mismatches, and processing errors.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "Ubiquiti"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Events = count(),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            Products = make_set(DeviceProduct, 5),
            Categories = make_set(DeviceEventCategory, 8)
  by Computer
| order by Events desc
content.title: Devices: events / hour, last seen
content.noDataMessage: No devices reporting. Check Logstash container health on UnRAID and confirm UniFi syslog is forwarded to the relay.
